'''''Nexus''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] belonging to the Empire. Along with its sister ship [[Xerxes (Carrack-class)|''Xerxes'']] and the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Vagrant]]'', it attempted to stop the [[Defiance Task Force]] from rendezvousing with the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], but were held back by [[A-wing]]s, two of which were piloted by [[Olin Garn]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
